description: Legal document. In Hebrew. Fragment (lower left corner). Dating: Likely 11th century if not earlier. Deed of release (שטר פיצוי) given by a woman named Farjiyya to Shelomo b. Ṭovi[yya]. Signed by: Shelomo b. Yosef ha-Kohen; someone whose signature was written on his behalf (נ{כתבה} ע{דותו} ע{ל} פ{יו}); [...] b. Yaʿaqov; [...] b. Yosef; Yeshuʿa b. Yefet ha-Levi. (Information in part from Goitein’s index card)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
